name: OKCarz North Dale Mabry
description_short: Buy Here Pay Anywhere used car dealer in Tampa offering in-house financing through Mid Florida Financing for buyers with credit challenges, with flexible payment options and a 24-month/24,000-mile powertrain warranty.
description_long:
OK Carz North Dale Mabry is a used car dealership located at 6857 North Dale Mabry Highway in Tampa, Florida. The company operates as a Buy Here Pay Anywhere dealer, meaning it finances vehicle purchases directly to consumers rather than requiring traditional third-party auto loans. The dealership is part of the broader OK Carz network and partners with Mid Florida Financing to provide lending solutions.

The dealership offers a curated inventory of used vehicles including sedans, coupes, SUVs, crossovers, wagons, hatchbacks, passenger vans, and pickup trucks from brands such as Acura, Buick, Chevrolet, Honda, and Toyota. All vehicles undergo a two-stage inspection and reconditioning process with road testing before sale. Financing is available through their "OK Carz Finance Solution" partnership with Mid Florida Financing, designed specifically for customers with poor credit history or financial setbacks. Payment options include online portal, Walmart locations, Amscot locations, mail, and phone payments.

What distinguishes OK Carz North Dale Mabry is their stated focus on credit-challenged borrowers combined with their Buy Here Pay Anywhere model. Rather than requiring payments at the dealership location only, customers can make payments through multiple convenient channels. The company reports timely payments to all three credit bureaus, positioning the financing as a credit-building tool. Qualification requirements are straightforward: proof of income, valid U.S. Driver's license, and Florida residence verification. Down payments start at $499 for highest-qualifying buyers.

However, critical caveats exist: the website does not disclose interest rates, loan terms, or APR information—essential details for assessing whether this represents reasonable lending. As an in-house financing dealer (buy here pay here model), this is typically a higher-cost lending option with significant markup built into vehicle prices and interest charges. The dealership's business model depends on repeat payment revenue and vehicle repossession if payments lapse. No independent third-party reviews, complaint data, or regulatory information is visible on the provided website. Service and parts departments are listed as permanently closed, limiting post-purchase support.
address: 6857 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33614

company_info.headquarters: 6857 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33614

pros: Accepts customers with poor credit history and past financial hardship without requiring traditional credit scores
Reports timely payments to all three credit bureaus, potentially supporting credit score improvement
Multiple convenient payment channels including online, Walmart, Amscot, mail, and phone
Two-stage vehicle inspection and reconditioning process with road testing
Straightforward qualification requirements (proof of income, driver's license, Florida residency)
Down payments start as low as $499 for highest-qualifying applicants
Extended sales hours (9 AM–7 PM Monday–Saturday)
cons: No interest rates, APR, or loan terms disclosed on website—critical pricing information is hidden
Buy Here Pay Here dealers typically charge significantly higher interest rates and vehicle markups than traditional auto financing
Service and parts departments are permanently closed, limiting post-purchase vehicle support
No independent reviews, complaint data, or regulatory information provided to verify customer satisfaction
In-house financing creates repossession risk if payments are missed, and business model depends on repeat collection revenue
best_for: Buyers with poor credit history or recent financial setbacks who cannot qualify for traditional auto loans
Florida residents seeking convenient payment options beyond dealership locations
Individuals prioritizing credit-building through reported on-time payments to credit bureaus
Buyers willing to accept higher costs in exchange for flexible qualification criteria
diagnosis: OK Carz North Dale Mabry is designed for credit-challenged car buyers in Florida who cannot qualify for traditional auto financing and prioritize payment convenience. The main caveat is that buy here pay here dealers are inherently high-cost lending products with undisclosed interest rates, significant vehicle markups, and repossession risk—borrowers should seek rate quotes from traditional auto lenders before committing, as the true cost of financing may be substantially higher than alternatives.
services: Buy Here Pay Anywhere vehicle financing through Mid Florida Financing
Used vehicle sales (sedans, SUVs, trucks, vans, crossovers)
